message:
test(connectors): add integration test suites for 17 connectors

Add comprehensive wiremock-backed integration test suites for 17
connectors, covering configure, handshake, health check, invoke
operations, error handling, and edge cases.

Test suites added (connectors/*/tests/integration.rs):
- airtable (688 lines): CRUD operations, field filtering, pagination
- browser (851 lines): navigation, screenshot, DOM interaction
- gmail (695 lines): send, search, labels, thread management
- google-ai (932 lines): generate content, streaming, safety settings
- google-calendar (523 lines): event CRUD, recurring events, attendees
- linear (768 lines): issues, projects, teams, GraphQL queries
- microsoft365 (1043 lines): mail, calendar, contacts, drive operations
- notion (620 lines): pages, databases, blocks, search
- pinecone (752 lines): upsert, query, delete, index lifecycle
- plaid (728 lines): link tokens, accounts, transactions, auth
- qdrant (458 lines): collections, points, search, batch operations
- s3 (442 lines): get/put/delete objects, list, presigned URLs
- stripe (637 lines): customers, subscriptions, invoices, payments
- telegram (468 lines): messages, media, webhooks, polling
- twitter (562 lines): tweets, users, timelines, search
- youtube (749 lines): search, videos, channels, playlists
- zendesk (791 lines): tickets, users, organizations, search

Total: ~11,916 lines of new integration tests across all connectors.
Each test suite uses wiremock for HTTP mocking, exercises the full
configure -> handshake -> invoke lifecycle, and validates both success
paths and error handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
